title: Mind Sap negates Undead King and returns linked Limited Summon

card.rawText: At any point during the game, play this card from your hand. Negate the equipped creature's effects. While equipped, this card acts as an Infinite equip magic card.

plan.title: Mind Sap negates Undead King and returns linked Limited Summon
plan.summary: Play Mind Sap from hand, choose the opponent Undead King as the equipped creature, and verify Undead King's linked Limited Summon returns when the creature effect is negated.

notes: Place opponent Undead King on the field as primary.
Start with an Undead King-linked Limited Summon on opponent field.
Target the opponent Undead King with Mind Sap.

steps: Player 1 plays Mind Sap from hand.
Choose opponent Undead King as the creature to equip and negate.
Verify linked Limited Summon cleanup happens because Undead King's effect is negated.

expectedAssertions.label: Mind Sap equipped and suppressing target
Mind Sap remains in controller magic slot

manualVerification: Confirm the player chooses the creature Mind Sap equips to; this should not auto-pick the target.
riskNotes: Mind Sap can equip either player's creature unless another rule text limits the target.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Verify chosen creature effect negation and source-linked cleanup.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
